title: Doflamingo Tightens the Birdcage — Part 2
description: The shrinking Birdcage turns Dressrosa into a death trap while Doflamingo resets the rules of his game.
scene: On pages 9–13, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo, King Riku, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're the one that's gonna disappear, Doflamingo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This "ope" is going to destroy you from the inside out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That little bastard's still alive and kicking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How are you able to do an "Ope One" attack without your damn "room"?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...this whole place is the inside of a "room"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's probably numbered my days a little, but... I've created a giant room so big that you didn't even realize it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And I just kept it up while clinging onto life...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...All for the sake of waiting for an opening... this instant... to get in this one attack ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: When it's all over, I'll put you back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: ...Don't look back at me!! I've got a plan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Even you won't be able to stand up to this attack!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: DOFFY!! You're Royalty!!! Don't Let Your Knees Touch The Ground~!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It's no use....!! Even if you kill me, you're already ....!

summary: This part focuses on doflamingo tightens the birdcage, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
